title: Junior Revenue Manager at McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
